description: 2020 Bulkers Ltd. owns and operates large dry bulk vessels worldwide. It operates six scrubber fitted 208,000 deadweight tonnage Newcastlemax dry bulk vessels. 2020 Bulkers Ltd. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Hamilton, Bermuda.
